chunks.title: Introduction to the Oracle
chunks.reason: Yahweh addresses Israel directly and states the reason for judgment.

chunks.title: Rhetorical Questions on Causality
chunks.reason: A series of rhetorical questions establishing that events have causes and God reveals His plans through prophets.

chunks.title: Judgment on Samaria
chunks.reason: Command to announce the gathering of enemies and the inevitable plundering of the city.

chunks.title: Testimony Against the House of Jacob
chunks.reason: Call to witness against Israel and specific details of punishment on altars and houses.
